title: Achievements
description: Achievements n ISO 9001 Certification from TUV Rheinland (India) Pvt. Ltd., Chandigarh. Awarded with Certificate of Conformity (CE) received from ICL Certification Limited, New Delhi from 2 nd March, 2007 to 1 st March, 2010. Awarded with Silver prize in Brand & IPR Awards organized by Chamber of Industrial & Commerical Undertaking, Ludhiana on 23 rd November, 2017. Awarded with Second prize in Kisan Mela organized by Punjab Agricultural University, Ludhiana on 23 rd March & 24 th March, 2018. Awarded with Certificate of Appreciation in Financing Energy Efficiency at MSMEs organized by Bureau of Energy Efficiency, New Delhi on 18 th February, 2019. Awarded with Second Award in Environment Excellence Award organized by Chamber of Industrial & Commerical Undertaking, Ludhiana on 14 th August, 2019. Awarded with Second prize in Kisan Mela organized by Punjab Agricultural University, Ludhiana on 21 st September & 22 nd September, 2019. ISO 50001 Certification in Energy Management from BSI, India. Awarded with Bronze Rating in ZED (Zero Defect – Zero Effect) from Ministry of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises & Quality Council of India on 27 th January, 2020. Awarded with Greenpreneur Award in Energy Management organized by FICCI Flo, Amritsar on 4 th June, 2021. Awarded with AEO - T1 Certificate from Government of India from 9 th January, 2019 to 8 th January, 2022. Awarded with Certificate of Appreciation in Eisenwarenmesse organized by Koelnmesse Pvt. Ltd., New Delhi from 2 nd to 4 th December 2023.
